decisions.what: Imported Inter via Google Fonts at top of index.css
decisions.why: Specification said to include @font-face or Google Fonts import for Inter if not handled in HTML; index.html does not load Inter, so the @import covers the requirement.
tsconfig.app.json defines the '@/*' path alias mapped to './src/*', matching project conventions.

decisions.what: Typed ScrollReveal ease as a 4-tuple [number, number, number, number]
decisions.why: Framer Motion's ease prop expects a fixed-length tuple for cubic-bezier curves; widening to number[] causes type errors under strict mode.

decisions.what: Used getInitialPreference for SSR-safe initial state in useReducedMotion
decisions.why: Avoids running matchMedia during SSR and prevents a hydration flash by reading the actual preference synchronously when window is available.

decisions.what: Added scrollbar-hide utility plus dark-themed default scrollbar styling
decisions.why: Spec asked for a scrollbar-hide utility for custom scrollbar styling on dark theme.
